metadata.title: FLUX.2 Pro - AI Image Generator & Editor | Marble AI
metadata.description: FLUX.2 Pro by Black Forest Labs. Advanced image generation model delivering photoreal detail, strong multi-reference consistency, and accurate text rendering. Supports both text-to-image and image-to-image.

hero.title: FLUX.2 Pro
hero.description: Black Forest Labs' advanced image generation model. Delivers photoreal detail, strong multi-reference consistency, and accurate text rendering with flexible control.

introduce.title: About FLUX.2 Pro
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Flux 2 is Black Forest Labs' advanced image generation model that delivers photoreal detail, strong multi-reference consistency, and accurate text rendering with flexible control.

items.title: Photoreal Detail
items.description: Generate stunning photorealistic images with exceptional detail and natural textures.

items.title: Multi-Reference Consistency
items.description: Strong consistency across multiple references for cohesive visual storytelling.

items.title: Accurate Text Rendering
items.description: Precise text rendering within images for typography-focused designs.

items.title: Flexible Control
items.description: Extensive control options for fine-tuning generation parameters and artistic direction.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover what makes FLUX.2 Pro a leading image generation model.

items.title: Dual Generation Modes
items.description: Supports both text-to-image generation and image-to-image editing for versatile workflows.

items.title: Next-Gen Technology
items.description: Built by the original Stable Diffusion team with cutting-edge AI research.

items.title: Style Versatility
items.description: Support for diverse artistic styles from photorealistic to artistic illustrations.

items.title: Fast Processing
items.description: Optimized inference for quick generation without compromising quality.

items.title: API Integration
items.description: Seamless API access for developers to integrate into applications.

items.title: Commercial License
items.description: Full commercial rights for all generated and edited images.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore the diverse applications of FLUX.2 Pro.

items.title: Concept Art
items.description: Create stunning concept art for games, films, and creative projects.

items.title: Marketing Visuals
items.description: Generate high-quality marketing materials with accurate text and branding.

items.title: Product Design
items.description: Visualize product concepts and design iterations quickly.

items.title: Editorial Content
items.description: Produce editorial images with consistent style and multi-reference support.

items.title: Brand Identity
items.description: Develop consistent brand imagery across multiple visual assets.

items.title: Creative Exploration
items.description: Explore artistic directions with flexible control and style options.

items.title: What is FLUX.2 Pro?
items.description: FLUX.2 Pro is Black Forest Labs' advanced image generation model known for photoreal detail, multi-reference consistency, and accurate text rendering.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: FLUX.2 Pro supports both Text To Image (generating images from text descriptions) and Image To Image (editing and transforming existing images).

items.title: Who created FLUX.2 Pro?
items.description: FLUX.2 Pro is created by Black Forest Labs, the original team behind Stable Diffusion.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: FLUX.2 Pro excels at photoreal detail, multi-reference consistency, and accurate text rendering with flexible artistic control.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All images generated or edited with FLUX.2 Pro through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: Is it good for concept art?
items.description: Yes! FLUX.2 Pro is excellent for concept art with its photoreal detail and flexible style control.

cta.title: Ready to Try FLUX.2 Pro?
cta.description: Experience Black Forest Labs' advanced image generation. Create photorealistic visuals with flexible control.
